reviews.title: Ruined Weekend at Leela Goa
reviews.text: We had stayed at Taj Holiday Village and had a fantastic time.  I had stayed at Leela Bangalore on my business trip & based on some reviews decided to stay at Leela Goa. This place is very luxurious with gardens & lagoons, the rooms are clean and spacious however the service has a lot to be desired & very ordinary.  After a long overnight journey, I reached the hotel only to wait forever to be checked-in. I was patient & went thru the hotel formalities. My wife joined me a day later, she went thru the same ordeal. We requested the staff to complete the check-in formalities a bit later since my wife was hungry. We decided to leave as we were left waiting & unattended for 20 mins. We had to carry our bags & walk to our room as the golf cart wasn't available. I was really hoping to have a good relaxing weekend in Goa but Leela’s customer service simply ruined our weekend. Leela’s lacks customer service and leadership. They were hardly apologetic & did not acknowledge any negative reviews.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you for your feedback.  
At our resort, we take guest feedback very seriously and ensure that we investigate our valued guest’s comments and utilize the learnings for improving internal processes. Having personally investigated your feedback (including reviewing CCTV footage), please allow me to clarify that you seem to have highly exaggerated the delay in time taken for completion of check-in formalities.  We are also disappointed that your chose not to appreciate the graciousness of our Front Office Associate who worked hard ( along with Housekeeping ) to allocate you a room at 1110 hrs ( over a full house ) even though the standard check-in time is 1400 hrs. I can also confirm that the check-in formalities for your wife were completed in 6 minutes whereas the buggy did take a little over 5 minutes, again, since the hotel operations were busy that day.In your case, your check-in formalities ( since you visited us a day earlier ) were completed in under 4 minutes.

On the downside it's at the far southern end of Goa so it's a bit further from the airport and getting a Taxi / Transportation in Goa is quite tricky (but the airport provides free airport shuttle).

very enjoyable stay. be aware that the conservatory premier rooms do not have a balcony, wheras standard rooms do, which we found rather strange. the hotel's main bar is not air conditioned, making it very hot and humid, particularly at this time of year (march/april).
airport transfers, which take about one hour, are provided in a minibus.
the all meal package provides (good) buffet dining for all three daily meals. if alternative restaurants are used, no credit is given. leela is a member of gha, a multiple hotel group loyalty scheme. membership of gha is free and provides free wifi.
the majority of leela goa's customers when we were there were russian and indian.
the hotel's staff, with very few exceptions, were exceptional. with an excellent customer focussed attitude.

reviews.title: Perfection at highest rates!
reviews.text:
If you ever stay at the LEELA, you will enjoy the perfection of hospitality. Location: Perfect, Beach: Stunning, General facilities: Perfect, Gardens: Outstanding (more a park), Rooms: Clean and spacy, Hotel staff: honestly friendly and helpful, Spa: good, Restaurant: Great qualities, Breakfast: Outstanding with many choices!
We are living in Thailand and therefore have already been able to enjoy many high class resorts, but THE LEELA is among the best we have ever been.  
There is only one obstacle: The Prices! Even though you enjoy perfect services, everything is terribly overpriced. We are definitely willing to pay good prices for the good service, but any guest should be aware that in this hotel you will need a big wallet for everything.
However, if you can afford it, there is no alternative, and you should stay in this gorgeous place. No compromise! Do it!

Everything else was great apart from the selling. I wouldn't go back here if I went to goa again.

reviews.title: The Leela Goa was absolute luxury in every way.
reviews.text: I was so lucky to grab the Leela Goa (via Agoda) during the off-season at an incredibly affordable price, but I must admit that even though the experience is probably worth every penny of the rates it usually commands ($300-400/night during from Oct-Apr)...I probably wouldn't have been able to afford such luxury if not for the off-season.  The airport shuttle was a 5-series BMW, there were staff attendants to serve your every whim...from assistance in the "locker room" after a workout in the gym, to a security guard to carry a flashlight 10 steps behind you if you wanted to walk on the beach after sunset.  The only warning I would issue is that the cuisine is not very western-friendly.  I ate an apple from my room on the first morning and spent the next 2 hours sick in the bathroom.  The buffet is filled with Indian and Chinese options, which are either very spicy (as is consistent with the rest of India) and/or full of uncooked fruits and veggies, which are no-nos for Westerners.  But that is literally the ONLY "complaint" I could muster, and its a mild complaint as part of the adventure of India is navigating a wild assortment of new foods!  The resort is absolutely the definition of luxury and beauty, perfectly relaxing and comfortable.  I even rented a moped and explored the surrounding villages, and felt very safe doing so.  Thanks for such a wonderful stay!!
reviews.positives: The resort was gorgeous - from the interior decor, the pristinely-manicured grouds, to the location on a private beach.  The staff was so friendly and accomodating, service was 2nd to NONE!

reviews.title: Outstanding - Absolute luxury
reviews.text:
We stayed in the Leela for 4 nights in August - it was amazing! The rooms are superbly luxurious with luxury features throughout. The staff are incredibly helpful, friendly and knowledeable about any topic we required help with. We stayed during monsoon and the weather was great; just a few showers during the day which didn't affect our stay one bit. There are lots of restaurants in the area which are very reasonably priced for great food. Access to other parts of Goa can be easily accessed by taxi, local bus, or by hiring motorbikes in the shops near to the hotel. A local knowledge source is Bryson's Shop just 50m from the hotel who offers every day items, local information, and friendly advice.

Overall our etay was incredible

reviews.title: A Truly Exceptional Ultra‑Luxury Stay
reviews.text:
Stay Type: One week | Couple | Relaxation & Recharge

We spent a week at The St. Regis Goa and it was exceptional from start to finish. One of the best check‑in experiences we’ve ever had, thanks to Vashu, who welcomed us warmly, seated us comfortably on a sofa rather than at a desk, answered all our questions, and personally escorted us to our room. A brilliant first impression.
Our room was immaculate, incredibly comfortable (AC + ceiling fan) and overlooked the lagoon — perfect for a relaxed, restorative break.

Service across the resort was consistently polished, warm, and proactive. On the rare occasion something needed attention, it was resolved immediately with flexible solutions, not restricted with policy.

The Butler service was a real highlight, Rishin was fantastic, knowledgeable, responsive day or night, and genuinely thoughtful.

Dining was excellent throughout our half‑board stay, with great flexibility, personalised dishes, and attentive service at every meal.

Shout out in no particular order to Rovin (Lobby Barmen), Kanika, Anuj & Rijol. All of them were fantastic!

A truly impressive resort that makes you feel genuinely cared for. We left extremely happy and would absolutely return and recommend.

reviews.text:
Our stay at St. Regis Resort and Spa in Goa was nothing short of excellent. The property, situated right on the mobor beach, offered breathtaking views and a serene ambiance. We opted for the suite rooms, which were incredibly spacious and perfectly suited our family of four.

What truly sets this property apart is the exceptional level of customer service and the overall experience provided. From the moment we stepped in, the staff, from the front desk to housekeeping, displayed unparalleled professionalism and hospitality. The chefs and the entire Butler service were dedicated to ensuring our stay was comfortable and memorable.

A highlight of our stay was undoubtedly the food at the property. The culinary offerings were nothing short of amazing, catering to a variety of tastes and preferences. Each meal was a delightful experience, showcasing the expertise of the chefs and the quality of the ingredients used.

Overall, our experience at St. Regis Resort and Spa was nothing short of phenomenal. The seamless blend of luxurious accommodation, top-notch service, and exquisite dining made our stay truly memorable. We are already looking forward to returning to this paradise on our next vacation.

reviews.title: Hotel de lujo mejorable
reviews.text:
Antes de nada, decir que el hotel en general esta bastante bien. A reseñar por ser un hotel de lujo: el coste de internet (te lo cobran si no te registras en su club),  es excesivamente caro todo los servicios no incluidos en tu tarifa (si contratas media pensión, la mayoría de platos tienen un sobre coste), te reiteran infinitas veces que estás obligado a abandonar la habitación a las 12:00. Ni un minuto más aunque tu vuelo sea de tarde.
Una hora antes de marcharte, te interrumpen en tu habitación para revisar el minibar. Intentamos pedir que lo hicieran a las 12, pero no!!! Tenía que ser en ese momento. Y por último, nada más hacer el check out, nos quitaron el acceso a internet. 
Conclusión: para ser un hotel de lujo (y he estado en muchos), deja muchos detalles que desear.

reviews.title: Das beste Hotel, das wir je besucht haben!
reviews.text:
Man kann nur sagen - dieses Hotel ist wirklich und wahrhaftig ein 5* Hotel. Angefangen vom Service und der Freundlichkeit der Angestellten bis hin zum Ambiente und der guten Küche.
Wir waren von 25.05.-31.05. in einem Lagoon Terrace Zimmer raltiv nahe zum Haupthaus untergebracht. Das Zimmer wurde jeden Tag picobello sauber gemacht und man bekam täglich frisches Obst und ausreichend Wasser aufs Zimmer gebracht. 
Wir hatten Übernachtung mit Frühstück gebucht und ich kann nur sagen, das Frühstücksbuffet spielt alle Stücke. Das Personal ist sehr gut geschult, spricht super Englisch und ist außerordentlich aufmerksam. Die Auswahl ist riesengroß und sehr ansprechend arrangiert. Internationale Gerichte, Englisches Frühstück, Indische Speisen, Köche für frisch zubereitete Speisen wie Spiegelei, Omelett usw. wie auch eine kleine "Bäckerei" die laufend frische Croissants, Waffeln oder Pancakes backen, stehen zur Auswahl. 
Der Pool hat eine gute Größe, ist jedoch auf Grund der Außentemperatur nicht wirklich erfrischend - wir haben das Meer und den wunderschönen breiten Sandstrand vorgezogen, wo wir auch dort eine tolle Betreuung durch das Personal und den Kellnern der Beach-Bar erfahren haben. Für die, die im Urlaub auch ein bisschen aktiv sein möchten, steht ein top ausgestattetes Fitnessstudio zur Verfügung, sowie tägliche Joga-Stunden in atemberaubender Umgebung. 
Der einzige Kritikpunkt der mir einfällt ist, dass das es kein "Free Wifi" gibt und dies relativ hochpreisig in verschiedenen Paketen kaufen kann. 
Ansonsten kann ich nur sagen - wir waren 1 Woche im Paradies und würden jederzeit sofort wieder kommen!
reviews.positives: Service, Strand bzw. Lagune und Essen

reviews.title: Wunderschönne, großzügige Anlage
reviews.text: Haben nach einer Nordindienrundreise zehn Tage im Resort verbracht und haben uns dort sehr wohlgefühlt. Angefangen vom tollen Zimmer bis zur hervorragenden Küche, die sowohl indische als auch internationale Gerichte beinhaltet.
reviews.positives: Zimmer, Frühstück, unglaublich großzügig gestaltete Anlage mit toller Flora und Fauna

reviews.title: Luxus im Süden von Goa
reviews.text: Tolles Resort mit sehr hochklassigen Anspruch und exzellentem Personal. Die Anlage wird gerade zu Teilen erneuert, dies geschieht in der Nebensaison und man bekommt es aufgrund der Weitläufigkeit nur am Rande mit. Mitarbeiter Obli ist uns ganz besonders in Erinnerung geblieben.  Küche auf Sterneniveau!
reviews.response:
Dear Matthias,

Thank you for taking the time to leave us this lovely review. 
We are so glad that you enjoyed your time with us and our hosts were able to enhance your holiday experience with their warm service. 
Thank you for recognizing Obuli… He sends you his best regards.

We just can’t wait to unveil 3 brand new restaurants and a set of all new, contemporary guest rooms, with a design led, swimming pool in November. 
Please come back and visit us soon again. The teams look forward to taking care of you.

Warm Regards,
Satish Kumar
General Manager

reviews.title: Wunderschönes Hotel zum relaxen
reviews.text: Das Hotel, das Ambiente, die Sauberkeit aber besonders die Speisen und Getränke sowie das gesamte Personal sind unübertrefflich! Es wird jeder Wunsch erfüllt. Ich selbst bin veganerin und bei dem Abendbuffet (wir hatten HP) gab es wenig bis keine veganen Speisen. Deshalb wurde mir jeden Abend ein seperates Essen gekocht und jeder einzelne war wunderbar! Das Personal hat mir Empfehlungen geben und mich immer wieder überrascht. Das Frühstücks- u. Abendbuffet lassen keine Wünsche offen. Die Zimmer sind sehr groß, gepflegt und sauber! An dem Hotel und in der Anlage wird täglich ohne das die Gäste gestört werden geputzt und gearbeitet damit alles so gepflegt bleibt. Der Pool ist schön angelegt u. der Strand ist ebenfalls sehr sauber. Einzig die 4 Schmuckverkäuferinnen haben etwas genervt aber das gehört in Indien nunmal dazu. Das Spa ist ebenfalls sehr zu empfehlen. Die Preise sind angemessen. (90min Ganzkörpermassage/60€) Fazit: Wir kommen bestimmt wieder!!! Weiter so!

reviews.title: I had mixed feelings about our recent stay with my 4-year-old. On one hand, the food is extremely good—it was a highligh
reviews.positives:
We recently stayed at the St. Regis Goa with our 4-year-old, and it was nothing short of awesome. If you are traveling with a young child, this is easily one of the best properties in South Goa.

The Highlights:

The Food: This was the standout for us. The food is extremely good with an incredible variety. Whether it was the massive breakfast spread at Miri or the specialized options for kids, we never ran out of delicious things to try.

Family Friendly: The staff went out of their way to make our little one feel welcome. From the kids' club activities to the dedicated children's pool, there was always something to keep a high-energy toddler occupied.

The Property: The resort is sprawling and lush (the lagoons and lily ponds are beautiful), which made for great evening walks. Having direct access to the clean, white sands of Mobor Beach was the icing on the cake.
reviews.negatives:
the water was dirty when I tried to fill the bathtub. I immediately reached out to Shivani, our point of contact, to highlight the problem. Unfortunately, she didn't bother to address the issue and didn't even respond to my concern.

In a luxury resort like St. Regis, you expect a high level of responsiveness, especially regarding basic hygiene like clean water. While the culinary team gets a 10/10, the lack of communication from the guest relations side brought my overall experience down to an 8.

reviews.title: Неоправданно дорогой отель
reviews.text: То что называется лагуной, на самом деле является искусственной речкой, до моря идти далеко. Сам пляж не принадлежит отелю, потому там работают доставучие индусы со всякими сувенирами, не отвяжутся пока не уйдешь. Цены в отеле на еду и услуги по местным меркам зашкаливают!Интернет медленный и платный, что не должно быть в отелях такого уровня!По близости очень мало ресторанов и развлечений, вся жизнь проходит в отеле. С трудом смогли вять в аренду мотобайк.
reviews.positives: Большие номера, хороший ремонт, большая охраняемая территория

reviews.title: A slice of paradise
reviews.positives: The property overall was stunning, it felt like a slice of paradise and the staff were beyond amazing. Perfect property for a solo trip that was meant for relaxing and recharging.
reviews.negatives: I learned that the hotel had recently renovated 100 rooms, my room was not one of them - I felt although it had a stunning view, the room itself was a little dated.

reviews.title: Романтика
reviews.text: Отель очень понравился. Начиная со встречи в аэропорте на новеньком белоснежном бмв. Номер очень приятный, есть все что нужно. Огромная ванная комната, есть душ и огромная ванна. Из окна вид на лагуну, поэтому никто не ходит под окнами и не мешает спать. Питание хорошее, но плата за обеды и ужины достаточно высока. Иногда ходили в шек на пляже Pearls - впринципе вкусно, недорого, организм не пострадал. Отель очень рекомендую для романтического отдыха.
reviews.positives: Отличный пляж, качественные номера, красивая территория отеля

reviews.title: прекрасный отель
reviews.text: Рекомендую всем данный отель, адекватная стоиомость за такое качество. В отеле есть все, что нужно. По приезду неожиданно узнали, что в стоимость включены обеды и ужины. Практически всегда были морепродукты.  Очень вкусно готовили курочку вок и ризотто. Часть блюд острая, но всегда на шведском столе были вкусные неострые блюда. на море волны, купаться интересено)
reviews.positives: высокий уровень сервиса, качественная кухня, красивейшая территория

reviews.title: Отличный отель для взрослых
reviews.text: Отличный вариант для взрослых, детям думаю будет скучно. Недешевый! Средний счет на двоих за обед или ужин ~ 20 т руб с алко. Выгоднее брать FB, если хочется сэкономить. И приезжать с местным налом, чтобы не терять на конвертациях и курсах.

reviews.title: Идеально
reviews.text: Роскошный отель , номера отличные территория шикарная ( есть с чем сравнить, много путешествую).Для спокойного беззаботного отдыха рекомендую , подойдёт как для детей так и для взрослых ( романтических путешествий).

reviews.title: великолепно
reviews.text: Пишу отзыв, потому что сама выбирала отель по отзывам. Советую тем у кого есть возможность ехать В ЛИЛУ. Сравним с 5-ми на Пхукете.Кто хочет найти минусы, то тот их найдет, если Вы едите отдохнуть, то все есть. Море отлично, но есть мелкие волны всегда после обеда, я купаюсь только в очках для плавания, поэтому нет проблем.Питание в любое время в ресторанчиках.Например,когда мы не нашли мясо на ужине(стейки были не каждый день на ужине по системе "буфет"),  и сказали об этом , для нас нажарили стейки! Русские девушки постоянно есть в отеле и тем кому нужно помогают. Была рядом 5 дней в Холидей(4*)-это мах -3*. Если ГОА, то это - ЛИЛА!хочется вернуться.
reviews.positives: Супер территория отеля, отношение персонала и сервис достойно.

reviews.title: Fantastisk flott sted med god service
reviews.text: vi hadde det helt perfekt. med oppgradering til club suite ble det et luksusopphold vi aldri før har opplevd. maten var god, spa/massasje var fantastisk bra, og de ansatte ytte god service. det eneste negative var alle kråkene på området, som til tider var svært nærgående (spesielt når det var matservering utendørs). de var over alt, og i noen områder var det stor risiko for å få noe ekkelt i hodet.
reviews.positives: Rolig og fredelig med nydelig park/hageanlegg

reviews.title: Resort renovations under way
reviews.text: The resort location undoubtedly remains one of the best secluded ones of south Goa- the services themselves are slipping in terms of basics! The food and beverages are good! But the resort is under renovation and a lot activities are closed! Hope they can operate in full swing soon and not be a disappointment if n terms of room, amenities and activities
reviews.response:
Dear Kritika,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this feedback. The resort is currently undergoing a phased upgradation and we can’t wait to unveil the revitalized facilities later this year, during the festive period.
We do hope that during your next stay with us, you will be able to enjoy the revitalized facilities. 
Please come back and visit us soon again. The teams look forward to taking care of you.

Warm Regards, 
Satish Kumar 
General Manager

reviews.title: Stay was wonderful
reviews.positives: Staff is very nice
reviews.negatives: Breakfast lines, at the restaurant, can be more organized when it comes to seating the guests

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
From the moment we checked in, we knew this stay would be something special. Shavon, our personal butler, welcomed us with such warmth and immediately made us feel at home. She took the time to show us around the beautifully tranquil estate, and the personalised welcome in our room genuinely touched our hearts. Throughout our stay, her attentiveness tied everything together effortlessly — from dining reservations and spa treatments to laundry and even arranging a nanny. Nothing ever felt like too much trouble.

A heartfelt thank you as well to Moon and Hasan, who took such consistent and thoughtful care of our room. The little touches, especially the towel animals left on the bed for our son, didn’t go unnoticed and meant so much to us as a family.

We did encounter a small hiccup with the facilities, but Sabitry, the duty manager, handled it with such grace and professionalism. She resolved everything quickly and pleasantly, turning the situation around and making the rest of our stay even more enjoyable. It reminded me that all it really took was a respectful ask — and everything was handled beautifully. Thank you again, Sabitry.

The F&B team were the true MVPs of our stay. Anuj — who I’ll now happily call a friend — made our experience genuinely unforgettable with his warmth and personality. Chef Ravinder and his incredible team (Aditya, Nilesh, Sonam, Aanya, and others I wish I could name individually) at Susegado and the beach delivered exceptional dishes time and time again. Dining while watching those breathtaking sunset views was something we’ll never forget. The team at Miri restaurant (Rijol, Vanshita, Daiveek, Taha, and many more) were equally fantastic — every interaction felt personal, warm, and sincere. To all of you who made such an impact on our stay: thank you from the bottom of our hearts. We’ll be thinking of you when the post-holiday blues hit back home.

To summarise, this was without question one of the most special holidays we’ve ever...

reviews.title: Amazing upscale resort in south Goa.
reviews.positives:
We were traveling as a family of three. The St Regis in Goa was an exquisite holiday experience. The New Year’s party was extravagant with food, 

Our favorite part was the breakfast spread. Numerous south Indian, marathi, Gujarathi, Goanese, Punjabi, Continental and North Indian dishes were available and the preparation was excellent.

The staff were eager to serve and well trained. The room was nicely appointed and we also had dinner and lunch on the premises several times. 

Though it is far away from the central and North Goa party scene, it was a perfect resort for a family vacation. We would highly recommend it for a family trip or romantic retreat.
reviews.negatives: Food, room, service

reviews.title: “A truly unforgettable stay in a beautiful, romantic setting — everything was perfect from start to finish!”
reviews.positives: St. Regis Goa is truly the best and most beautiful hotel and resort in Goa! My stay was an amazing and wonderful experience — I truly enjoyed it to the fullest. Everything was absolutely perfect: the place was spotlessly clean, the location was excellent, and the beach was breathtaking. The food was delicious, and the staff were extremely polite, friendly, and always willing to help without hesitation. The atmosphere is incredibly romantic, making it a perfect destination for a honeymoon. I will definitely repeat this special experience very soon!

reviews.title: My stay was exceptionally good to sum it up in a short sentence
reviews.positives: All the staff of St. Regis Goa are exceptionally hospitable and took utmost care in making our stay most memorable. This was the second time at the property, we last visited when it was called The Leela. What has made St Regis shine is ALL its staff. Each and everyone makes you feel so special. From the staff at the lobby to the culinary staff.. from the managers to the ones driving the buggies to take us around the hotel each and every one made it a point to personally approach us and greet us! Never experienced this kind of personalized service and warmth anywhere. Can’t wait to return again.
